prompt: I'm about to refactor our login form. It currently works fine. How do I capture baseline evidence before I start editing so I can prove the refactor didn't break anything?
expected_output: Before editing: Take a screenshot of the login form (e2e-evidence/baseline/login-form.png). Try a valid login and capture the response JSON (e2e-evidence/baseline/login-success.json). Try invalid credentials and capture the error (e2e-evidence/baseline/login-error.json). Save a summary to e2e-evidence/baseline/assessment.md. Now you can refactor. After refactor: re-run the same 3 captures and compare — if the form still works and API responses are identical, NO REGRESSION.
